title: Roasted Spring Onion Gratin
description: A rich and savory side dish featuring spring onions in a creamy gratin.
instructions: Slice the spring onions into 1-inch pieces, leaving the roots intact.
In a large skillet, sauté the spring onions in 1 tablespoon of butter until softened.
Add roasted garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate saucepan, combine heavy cream and grated Gruyère cheese. Stir over low heat until the cheese is melted and smooth.
Pour the cream mixture over the spring onion mixture in the baking dish.
Dot the top with remaining butter.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
